what_it_does: A hand-rolled module-level subscribe store for the surface's operator decision stack. It fetches pending decisions from /api/decisions, keeps only Tim-facing pending items, enriches each from /api/territory, and exposes loading, error, refreshError, open state, and open/close/load helpers to React subscribers via useDecisions.
observations: Implements a tiny pub/sub store with module-level state and a Set of subscriber callbacks.
Self-starts on the first useDecisions subscriber and registers a single window gallery:rerender listener at the store level.
Uses a monotonic loadSeq token to discard stale list responses.
Carries forward previously loaded enrichment fields (meaning, reversibility) by id to avoid reopen layout flicker.
Filters decisions by state==='pending' and owner==='tim' without hardcoding subtypes.
Maps every registry row to type 'decision-sequence' and leaves the type union as a single-value seam for future kinds.
Distinguishes cold-load errors from refresh errors, keeping the last-good list on a refresh failure.
enrich() merges patches by id rather than aborting on loadSeq, so in-flight enrichment still lands on currently shown rows.
standouts: Carry-forward of enrichment by id to prevent shrink-then-grow layout shifts.
Owner-based filter driven by a registry field rather than a hardcoded subtype set.
Single store-level gallery:rerender listener to avoid N reloads for N subscribers.
conventions: Follows the existing locus subscribe-store shape instead of introducing a new state pattern.
Registry-is-truth: renders fields declared by the registry and does not fabricate data.
Fail-loud on cold load, soft-degrade per item on enrichment.
Type dispatch leaves a fail-loud default seam for future composition-driven item types.
concerns: enrich() has no per-item error handling or timeout; a failing /api/territory call is silently swallowed by Promise.allSettled, which is intentional soft-degrade but leaves no observability.
The catch in loadDecisions discards the actual error message, always showing the same generic string.
window.addEventListener is never removed; acceptable for app-lifetime but prevents clean unmount or test isolation.
useDecisions returns the module state directly; consumers must not mutate it.
notes: This is the single source of truth for the operator's pending decision stack and the modal open state, shared between the bar and the inbox modal.
questions: What other StackItemType values will composition land, and how will the render switch handle them?
Is owner always present and normalized to 'tim'/'fabric' on /api/decisions, or can it be missing or null?
What UI consumes refreshError, and how subtle is the flag meant to be?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file is a shared subscribe store for Tim-facing pending decisions, with enrichment, open-state, and refresh-on-write behavior exactly as described in its header comments.
intention_signals: The code is trying to keep the operator's decision stack consistent, legible, and responsive without double-fetching or layout flicker, while remaining neutral to future decision/item types declared by the registry.
novelty: The combination of loadSeq stale-load guarding with merge-by-id enrichment carry-forward, plus the explicit cold-load versus refresh-error state split.
contribution: Provides a centralized, self-starting subscribe store that coordinates one fetch and one open-state for the decision stack, preserves already-loaded enrichment across reloads, and refreshes on gallery:rerender without scaling with subscriber count.
summary_for_embedding: A React-subscribe store that fetches and enriches Tim-facing pending decisions from the registry, manages stack modal open state, and refreshes on gallery:rerender.
intention_for_embedding: To give the surface's decision bar and inbox modal a single, flicker-free source of truth for operator-settleable items.

symbols.does: Declares the currently landed union of stack item types.
symbols.description: A type alias currently equal to the literal 'decision-sequence'. It is intentionally a single-value union so future composition-driven kinds can widen it without changing the store's shape.

symbols.does: Defines the shape of a channel-stack item.
symbols.description: Represents a pending operator-settleable item with registry-true fields such as id, address, type, name, subtype, owner, and optional enrichment fields meaning and reversibility pulled from /api/territory.

symbols.code_id: code://company/surface/app/src/decisions/decisionsStore.ts::isTimFacing | function | function isTimFacing(d: Record<string, unknown>): boolean {
symbols.does: Returns true when a registry row's owner field equals 'tim'.
symbols.description: A small predicate that lets the registry declare which side a decision belongs to, avoiding a hardcoded subtype set in the filter.

symbols.does: Declares the store's runtime state shape.
symbols.description: Holds the pending item list, loading flag, cold-load error message, refresh-error flag, and modal open boolean.

symbols.does: Patches module-level state and notifies all subscribers.
symbols.description: An internal reducer-like helper that creates a new state object and iterates the subscription set so every useDecisions hook re-renders.

symbols.does: Fetches /api/decisions and rebuilds the pending Tim-facing list.
symbols.description: Loads raw decisions, filters by pending state and Tim ownership, carries forward known enrichment by id, guards against stale responses with loadSeq, and triggers enrich(). It distinguishes a cold-load error from a refresh error.

symbols.does: Fetches each item's /api/territory record to add meaning and reversibility.
symbols.description: Uses Promise.allSettled to soft-degrade per item, then merges successful patches by id into the current pending list so in-flight enrichment still lands even if a newer load started.

symbols.does: Opens the stack modal and refreshes the decision list.
symbols.description: Sets open to true and calls loadDecisions so the user sees the latest queue when looking at it.
Sets open to false without clearing the list, so reopening can carry forward enrichment.

symbols.does: Initializes the store once on first subscription.
symbols.description: Guards with a started flag, kicks the initial load, and attaches a single window-level gallery:rerender listener to reload decisions after writes.

symbols.does: React hook that subscribes a component to the store.
symbols.description: Registers a force-render callback, calls ensureStarted, and returns the current module-level state on every render.

symbols.does: Subscriber callback that triggers a React re-render.
symbols.description: Created inside useDecisions and added to the subscription set; it bumps a local useState counter so the component re-renders when the store changes.
